embeds.description:
Below is the complete staff hierarchy for The SnowHaven Empire. Staff members are here to enforce the rules, help members, and keep the server safe.

**Do not DM staff for moderation issues.** Use the ticket system or report channel.

fields.name: 👑 Leadership
fields.value:
👑 **Foundership Team** — Founding members, highest authority
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 **Co-Founder** — Co-founding members
⚡ **Owner** — Server owner, absolute final authority
👑 **Co Owner** — Top-level administrative powers

fields.name: 🏛️ Administration
fields.value:
⛏️ **Head Executive** — Senior executive, major decisions
🏛️ **Executive** — Core leadership, oversees departments
🪩 **Head Administrator** — Manages the moderation team
🔥 **Administrator** — Full admin, broad moderation authority

fields.name: 🛡️ Moderation
fields.value:
🌙 **Head Moderator** — Leads moderators, handles escalated cases
🌀 **Moderator** — Active enforcement of community rules

fields.name: 📋 Staff Guidelines
fields.value:
• All staff decisions are **final**
• Respectful questioning is allowed — public arguments are not
• Use the appeal system for contested actions
• Do not DM staff about moderation issues

footer.text: All staff are volunteers. Treat them with respect.
